airTemp_mean_degC.rationale: PyFluxPro 'Ta' is the best-estimate air temperature aggregated from all available sensors

precip_tot_mm.rationale: PyFluxPro 'Precip' is the aggregated precipitation measurement

sws_mean_percent.rationale: PyFluxPro 'Sws' is the best-estimate soil water content. Source unit is volumetric fraction (0-1), AccelNet schema requires percent (0-100).

soilTemp_Mean_degC.rationale: PyFluxPro 'Ts' is the best-estimate soil temperature

file_mappings.rationale: TERN OzFlux NetCDF files contain only time-series flux/met data. Soil texture is static lab data not included.

global_warnings: SWC unit conversion is CRITICAL — source is fraction (0-1), target is percent (0-100)
Depths in 'height' attribute use negative convention (below ground) matching AccelNet schema
